extortion.description: Subject of activity Main activity  comprehensive administration in the area of ​​housing owned by the city of Znojmo ensuring matters in the interest of the city in the management of housing stock and other real estate owned by the city of Znojmo administration of the physical education and sports department, operation of sports facilities security of matters in the area of ​​personal culture, public toilets maintain and manage the property of the city of Znojmo.
